purpose: Initial arithmetic candidate frontier seeds for Truth Frontier Engine v1.

frontier_candidates.proposed_statement: A fraction represents a quantity as a ratio of two numbers, usually expressing part of a whole or division of quantities.
frontier_candidates.derivation_rationale: Division and ratio enable representation of part-whole and quotient relationships.

frontier_candidates.proposed_statement: A proportion is an equality between ratios.
frontier_candidates.derivation_rationale: Equality of Quantity and Ratio together enable the concept of equal ratios.

frontier_candidates.proposed_statement: Scale is a consistent ratio-based relationship between representation and reference.
frontier_candidates.derivation_rationale: Measurement and ratio together enable scaled representation.

frontier_candidates.proposed_statement: An integer is a whole number that may represent positive quantity, zero, or negative quantity.
frontier_candidates.derivation_rationale: Natural numbers and subtraction motivate extension to zero and negative whole-number values.
